description: I was playing a festive mashup pack and it showed up wrong. I saw the rain falling in very small and not clear snow I just want to make the rain rain clearly or with big snow and tysm n n
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Start Minecraft and navigate to the main menu.
2. Select "Play" and choose an existing world or create a new world.
3. Ensure that the "Festive Mash-up Pack" is applied to the world by accessing the "Resource Packs" menu and confirming the pack is enabled.
4. Enter the world and wait for the weather to change to rain or snow.
5. Observe the precipitation; note the size and clarity of the falling rain or snowflakes.
6. If the rain appears very small and unclear, exit the world and check the settings to ensure no other resource packs are conflicting with the Festive Mash-up Pack.
7. Re-enter the world to confirm if the issue persists with the precipitation visuals.
Observed Behavior: When using the Festive Mash-Up Pack, the weather effects are not displaying correctly. Instead of the expected large, clear snowflakes falling during snowy weather, the snow appears as very small and indistinct particles, resembling rain more than snow. Additionally, the rain itself is not visually clear, making it difficult to distinguish between rain and snow. This issue detracts from the immersive experience intended by the mash-up pack, which is designed to evoke a festive winter atmosphere. The player requests that the rain effect be made clearer and that the snowflakes be larger and more defined to enhance the visual fidelity of the game during snowy weather events.
Expected Behavior: I just want to make the rain rain clearly or with big snow.
